member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CQRSClientDomain
member.summary: Provides code generation functionality for CQRS (Command Query Responsibility Segregation) client-side code.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CQRSClientDomain.GenerateTypeScript(System.String)
member.summary: Generates TypeScript client code for CQRS queries and commands from C# source files.
member.param: The directory path containing the C# source files to parse.
member.returns: A string containing the generated TypeScript code.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CQRSClientDomain.GenerateJavaScript(System.String)
member.summary: Generates JavaScript client code for CQRS queries and commands from C# source files.
member.param: The directory path containing the C# source files to parse.
member.returns: A string containing the generated JavaScript code.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute
member.summary: Represents an attribute applied to a C# code element.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the attribute.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute.Arguments
member.summary: Gets the arguments passed to the attribute.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the attribute.
The arguments passed to the attribute.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpDelegate
member.summary: Represents a delegate declaration in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpDelegate.ReturnType
member.summary: Gets or sets the return type of the delegate.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpDelegate.Parameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters of the delegate.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The namespace containing the delegate.
The using directives available to the delegate.
The name of the delegate.
The return type of the delegate.
Whether the delegate is public.
The parameters of the delegate.
The attributes applied to the delegate.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnum
member.summary: Represents an enumeration declaration in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnum.Type
member.summary: Gets the underlying type of the enumeration.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnum.Values
member.summary: Gets the values defined in the enumeration.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The solution context.
The namespace containing the enumeration.
The using directives available to the enumeration.
The name of the enumeration.
The underlying type of the enumeration.
Whether the enumeration is public.
The values defined in the enumeration.
The attributes applied to the enumeration.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnumValue
member.summary: Represents a single value within an enumeration.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnumValue.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the enumeration value.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnumValue.Value
member.summary: Gets the numeric value of the enumeration member.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnumValue.Attributes
member.summary: Gets the attributes applied to the enumeration value.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpEnumValue.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the enumeration value.
The numeric value of the enumeration member.
The attributes applied to the enumeration value.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField
member.summary: Represents a field declaration in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the field.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the field.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.IsPublic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the field is public.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.IsStatic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the field is static.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the field is readonly.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.Attributes
member.summary: Gets the attributes applied to the field.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpField.#ctor(System.String,Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the field.
The type of the field.
Whether the field is public.
Whether the field is static.
Whether the field is readonly.
The attributes applied to the field.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext
member.summary: Represents the parsing context for a C# source file.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext.FileName
member.summary: Gets the name of the file being parsed.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext.Line
member.summary: Gets or sets the current line number in the file.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext.Usings
member.summary: Gets the using directives declared in the file.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext.Namespaces
member.summary: Gets the stack of namespaces currently being parsed.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext.CurrentNamespace
member.summary: Gets the current namespace being parsed, or null if not within a namespace.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpFileContext.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the file being parsed.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod
member.summary: Represents a method or constructor declaration in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the method.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.ReturnType
member.summary: Gets or sets the return type of the method.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.IsPublic
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the method is public.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.IsStatic
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the method is static.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.IsVirtual
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the method is virtual.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.IsAbstract
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the method is abstract.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.IsImplemented
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the method has an implementation.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.Parameters
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameters of the method.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpMethod.Attributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the attributes applied to the method.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the method.
The return type of the method.
Whether the method is public.
Whether the method is static.
Whether the method is virtual.
Whether the method is abstract.
Whether the method has an implementation.
The parameters of the method.
The attributes applied to the method.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace
member.summary: Represents a namespace declaration in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace.Names
member.summary: Gets the individual parts of the namespace name.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace.Name
member.summary: Gets the full namespace name.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The namespace name.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace.#ctor(Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a root namespace.
member.param: The root namespace to prepend, or null.
The namespace name.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject
member.summary: Represents a type declaration (class, struct, interface, record) in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Namespace
member.summary: Gets the namespace containing this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Usings
member.summary: Gets the using directives available to this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.ObjectType
member.summary: Gets the type category (class, struct, interface, etc.).

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Implements
member.summary: Gets the base types and interfaces this type implements.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.IsPublic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the type is public.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.IsStatic
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the type is static.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.IsAbstract
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the type is abstract.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.IsPartial
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the type is declared as partial.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.InnerClasses
member.summary: Gets the inner classes declared within this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.InnerStructs
member.summary: Gets the inner structs declared within this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.InnerInterfaces
member.summary: Gets the inner interfaces declared within this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.InnerEnums
member.summary: Gets the inner enums declared within this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.InnerDelegates
member.summary: Gets the inner delegates declared within this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Properties
member.summary: Gets the properties declared in this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Methods
member.summary: Gets the methods declared in this type (excluding constructors).

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Constructors
member.summary: Gets the constructors declared in this type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject.Attributes
member.summary: Gets the attributes applied to this type.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The namespace containing this type.
The using directives available to this type.
The name of the type.
The type category (class, struct, interface, etc.).
The base types and interfaces this type implements.
Whether the type is public.
Whether the type is static.
Whether the type is abstract.
Whether the type is declared as partial.
The inner classes declared within this type.
The inner structs declared within this type.
The inner interfaces declared within this type.
The inner enums declared within this type.
The inner delegates declared within this type.
The properties declared in this type.
The methods and constructors declared in this type.
The attributes applied to this type.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType
member.summary: Specifies the category of a C# type declaration.

member.name: F:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType.Class
member.summary: A class type.

member.name: F:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType.Struct
member.summary: A struct type.

member.name: F:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType.Interface
member.summary: An interface type.

member.name: F:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType.Enum
member.summary: An enumeration type.

member.name: F:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType.Delegate
member.summary: A delegate type.

member.name: F:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObjectType.Record
member.summary: A record type.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter
member.summary: Represents a parameter in a method, delegate, or constructor declaration.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the parameter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.Type
member.summary: Gets the type of the parameter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.IsIn
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the parameter is an 'in' parameter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.IsOut
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the parameter is an 'out' parameter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.IsRef
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the parameter is a 'ref' parameter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.DefaultValue
member.summary: Gets the default value of the parameter, if any.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParameter.#ctor(System.String,Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the parameter.
The type of the parameter.
Whether the parameter is an 'in' parameter.
Whether the parameter is an 'out' parameter.
Whether the parameter is a 'ref' parameter.
The default value of the parameter, if any.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParser
member.summary: Provides functionality to parse C# source code files into a structured representation.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpParser.ParseAllFiles(System.String)
member.summary: Parses all C# source files in a directory tree into a solution structure.
member.param: The root directory to search for C# files.
member.returns: A containing the parsed types and namespaces.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty
member.summary: Represents a property declaration in C# code.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the property.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the property.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.IsPublic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the property is public.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.IsStatic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the property is static.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.IsVirtual
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the property is virtual.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.IsAbstract
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the property is abstract.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.HasGet
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the property has a getter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.HasSet
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the property has a setter.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.IsGetPublic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the getter is public.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.IsSetPublic
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the setter is public.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.Attributes
member.summary: Gets the attributes applied to the property.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpProperty.#ctor(System.String,Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpAttribute})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the property.
The type of the property.
Whether the property is public.
Whether the property is static.
Whether the property is virtual.
Whether the property is abstract.
Whether the property has a getter.
Whether the property has a setter.
Whether the getter is public.
Whether the setter is public.
The attributes applied to the property.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution
member.summary: Represents a collection of parsed C# types and namespaces from source files.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.Namespaces
member.summary: Gets the namespaces found in the solution.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.Classes
member.summary: Gets the classes found in the solution.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.Structs
member.summary: Gets the structs found in the solution.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.Interfaces
member.summary: Gets the interfaces found in the solution.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.Enums
member.summary: Gets the enumerations found in the solution.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.Delegates
member.summary: Gets the delegates found in the solution.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType
member.summary: Represents a resolved C# type with generic arguments and type information.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType.NativeType
member.summary: Gets the native .NET type, if this represents a runtime type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType.SolutionType
member.summary: Gets the parsed C# type declaration, if this represents a type from the solution.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType.GenericArguments
member.summary: Gets the generic type arguments, if this is a generic type.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType.#ctor(System.String,System.Type,Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpObject,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpType})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the type.
The native .NET type, if applicable.
The parsed C# type declaration, if applicable.
The generic type arguments, if this is a generic type.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType
member.summary: Represents a C# type reference that has not yet been resolved to its actual type definition.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the unresolved type.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType.#ctor(Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpSolution,Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpNamespace},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The solution context for type resolution.
The namespace where the type reference appears.
The using directives available for type resolution.
The name of the unresolved type.

member.name: P:Zerra.T4.CSharp.CSharpUnresolvedType.Resolved
member.summary: Gets the resolved type information for this unresolved type reference.

member.name: T:Zerra.T4.MsSqlFirst
member.summary: Provides utilities for generating C# model and provider classes from SQL Server database schema.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.MsSqlFirst.GenerateModels(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates C# model classes from SQL Server database schema.
member.param: The SQL Server connection string.
The namespace for the generated model classes.
The suffix to append to each generated model class name.
member.returns: A string containing the generated C# model classes.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.MsSqlFirst.GenerateProviders(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates C# provider classes from SQL Server database schema.
member.param: The SQL Server connection string.
The namespace for the generated provider classes.
The suffix appended to model class names that the providers reference.
The base provider class that the generated providers inherit from.
Optional namespace to include in using directives.
member.returns: A string containing the generated C# provider classes.

member.name: M:Zerra.T4.MsSqlFirst.IsSafeName(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Determines if a name is a safe C# identifier and converts it to a safe name if necessary.
member.param: The name to check.
The safe C# identifier name.
member.returns: True if the original name was already safe; otherwise, false.
